title: AAA Mario / Focus, M
about:
AAA Mario or Triple-A Mario, also known as, Focus, M, refers to a parody voiceover video set to a gameplay clip of a project imagining what a stereotypical triple-A Super Mario Bros. video game might look like, notably featuring a moment in which Princess Peach says to Mario over a communication device, "Focus, M."

The animation was created by YouTuber Funkyzeit Games and the voiceover was performed by Ryan Stewart and Ariel Hack, and posted to Stewart's X / Twitter account, @RyanStewartVO, in late December 2025. The video went viral shortly after, spreading to other social media sites and inspiring memes and reactions online, many of which are based on the "Focus, M" dialogue that also became a catchphrase.
origin:
On August 18th, 2022, YouTuber[1] Funkyzeit Games posted a video titled, "I created a Mario game I always wish existed: Super Mario RTX – Unreal Engine 5," garnering over 650,000 views in three years. The video shows basic gameplay of a Super Mario Bros. game made in the Unreal Engine 5 game engine, making the game look more realistic, gritty and "triple-A."

On November 22nd, 2025, TikToker[2] @masonic106 posted a video setting realistic audio to footage of the original Super Mario Bros. Nintendo Entertainment System game, which was reuploaded by X[3] user @ramenoranges on December 18th, writing, "I'm gonna make a super mario au based off this video if this keeps happening," garnering over 18,000 likes in eight days.

Later that day, the same user quoted their X[4] post with a screenshot of the comment sections from Funkyzeit Games' 2022 video in which users imagine lines of dialogue that might appear in the realistic Unreal Engine 5 version of a Mario game, writing, "I might actually do this because this comment section gave me a good base for Mario's personality," gaining over 24,000 likes in eight days.

On December 19th, X[5] user and voiceover artist @RyanStewartVO posted a video reading the lines of dialogue commented over the Unreal Engine 5 Mario video, garnering over 64,000 views in a week.

On December 21st, 2025, he posted a second voiceover of the video to X,[6] this time featuring imagined dialogue between Mario and Princess Peach, who speaks to Mario over a communication device, garnering over 124,000 likes and 19,000 reposts in five days.

This video notably features the line, "Focus, M. Bowser's castle is just up ahead," spoken by Peach to Mario after he makes a joking remark at her. The dialogue is meant to replicate dialogue found in other AAA games. Peach is voiced by X[7] user @ArielHck.
